protocol.pseudo_generation: V0 make_pseudo: global upward shift / sparse upper-tail boost / mixed boost-suppression in response-matrix space
protocol.diagnostic_labels: true anomaly labels are used only to form real-anomaly/test-normal diagnostic groups

summary.interpretation_hint: If normal_pseudo distance is much larger than normal_real or pseudo-real distance remains large on high-response features, V0 pseudo anomalies are over-strong / misaligned relative to real anomalies.
